title: Robotics and Coding Teacher
description:
Job Description & Requirements

· Teach and conduct coding, STEM and technology-related classes and programmes

· Develop and curate curriculum resources

· Oversee and train students in preparation of coding & robotics competitions

· Groom and mentor students into passionate and curious individuals in technology

· Facilitate an inclusive and collaborative classroom environment

· Adopt supportive classroom approach which facilitates positive learning and development

· Encourage children to express their own personalities and thoughts through creative process

· Provide quality feedback on children development progress

· Participate in campus events including parent meeting sessions and festive events

· Perform any other duties and responsibilities as assigned by the STEM Teacher (Supervisor)


Job Specification:

· Diploma / Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Science / Computing / Technology / STEM-related fields

· Coding experience is not required; training will be provided. We are looking for keen learners with a deep interest to grow a career in the Tech Education sector

· Passion in teaching computer programming or STEM-related fields

· Passion for educating children, bonus if you have teaching experience

· Patient, approachable, and possess a passion for teaching kids and young adults

· Able to connect, interact, and establish cordial relationships with parents

· Possess a high degree of professionalism (e.g. in appearance, dressing, and communication skills)

· Energetic, with a positive can-do attitude

· Able to work well in a team

· Fresh Gradudates are welcome to apply.


Working Hours:

  • Monday: Off
  • Tuesday to Friday: 2:00 PM to 8:00 PM
  • Saturday and Sunday: 9:30 AM to 8:00 PM

postedCompany.description:
Futurum Academy is a school dedicated to cultivate multidimensional and collaborative critical thinking among youths.

Our curriculum is anchored on computational thinking, intergrating various disciplines such as coding, digital art, 3D design and printing, and engineering design to equip our students with the best knowledge, skills, and abilities to be future ready.

We believe that our cutting-edge STEAM education, combined with progressive curriculum and innovative practices, will benefit all our students.
postedCompany.name: FUTURUM SPACE PTE. LTD.
